chat_log.content:
Looking at your profile, Bruce. You're at the commitment phase on your 30-day goal — first real external conversation with an operations director outside your current company.

Last session you declared a LinkedIn post commitment: 3 sentences describing the downtime tracking system, the 23% reduction number, and that you're available to build this for other manufacturers. Due by Thursday May 28.

The profile shows that commitment is now marked done.

What happened? Tell me specifically — did you post it, and what came back?
